verdict.note: 真实后端 API（隔离 spex-init 项目）三腿：[[cjk-control]]→node=cjk-control/branch=node/cjk-control-7108；[[中文测试节点]]→node=中文测试节点/branch=node/中文测试节点-a7ed（CJK id 一等公民）；无 mention 普通 prompt→node=None、branch 由 prompt 词导出（唯一合法的未绑定路径）。

Real backend, isolated spex-init project, 3 sessions created: (1) prompt leading with [[nodealpha]] → record node='nodealpha', branch=node/nodealpha-6298 (ascii id binds even though the node doesn't exist); (2) [[清理节点]] → node='清理节点', branch=node/清理节点-f5ec (CJK id binds, any script); (3) plain prompt, no mention → node=null, branch=node/Reply-with-the-single-word-...-59fa derived from the prompt's own words (the only unbound path). No mentioned node silently dropped to null.

Re-measured at HEAD 9f418a66 through the real backend (:8791, isolated spex-init project, stub launcher): [[nodealpha]] → node='nodealpha' branch=node/nodealpha-bac8; [[清理节点]] → node='清理节点' branch=node/清理节点-9828 (CJK binds, any script); plain prompt → node=null, branch derived from the prompt's own words — the only unbound path; no mentioned node dropped to null.

re-measure post dac32664 (sendText grew replyVia + recordSent): isolated spex-init project on :8904, noop launcher — [[alpha]]→node alpha/branch node/alpha-8e52, [[中文节点]]→bound in full CJK, plain prompt→node null + word-derived branch; store records match

re-measured (staled by the sendText pane-guard edit): 3 real creates on an isolated spex-init backend — [[alpha]]→node alpha/branch node/alpha-6366, [[引导]]→node 引导/branch node/引导-174a, plain prompt→node null with prompt-word branch
ascii/CJK [[id]] both bind node+branch; mention-free prompt launches unbound with prompt-word branch — re-measured on the fix branch

Re-measured through the real POST /api/sessions on a fully isolated scratch deployment (throwaway repo spex-init'ed with a dummy launcher, scratch backend :8802, scratch tmux socket, per-project store auto-isolated — zero side effects on the live board; all artifacts torn down after). ascii [[foo-node]] and CJK [[中文节点]] mentions both bound node + branch (node/foo-node-1895, node/中文节点-026e) with matching worktrees and board attribution; a mention-free prompt launched unbound (node=null) with the prompt-word branch node/refactor-probe-widget-thing-2e9c. Binding is unaffected by the live-view transport change.
